title: Love Heart Ceramic Mug 540ml Cute Pink Valentine’s Coffee & Tea Cup Matte Finish Gift Mug for Hot Chocolate, Cocoa, or Gifting Assorted Designs (Red Heart)
features: ADORABLE VALENTINE’S DESIGN – Features cute heart graphics and “Love” lettering in four unique styles
540ML CAPACITY – Perfect size for your morning coffee, afternoon tea, or cozy cocoa
MAKES A SWEET GIFT – Ideal for Valentine’s Day, anniversaries, birthdays, or self-care moments
SOFT MATTE FINISH – Ceramic mug with a gentle pink glaze and comfortable rounded handle
ASSORTED DESIGN OPTIONS Choose from red heart dots, mini hearts, layered multicolour hearts, or white heart
description: Start your day with a dose of love using this 540ml Pink Heart Ceramic Mug. Available in four heartwarming designs, each mug features unique combinations of soft pink backgrounds, heart patterns, and elegant “Love” prints. Whether for Valentine's Day, gifting a friend, or adding a romantic touch to your morning routine, these mugs deliver both charm and function. Made from ceramic with a matte glaze, they feel as good as they look—lightweight, durable, and designed to brighten any moment.
